title: Review AGV Fault And Disconnect Items In The Map Monitor Message Panel
summary: Use the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface to review the AGV fault-related items shown in the training source: the AGV faults drop-down, the count of AGVs disconnected, the fault detail inspection area, and the Locate Faulted AGV item. This runbook is limited to identifying and recording what is visibly shown in the interface as documented by the source.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing the Map Monitor message panel to identify AGV fault-related controls and disconnect information exactly as shown in the training source.
not_for: Do not use for fault recovery or corrective action steps not stated in the source.
Do not use to interpret fault meanings beyond the visible labels shown in the interface.
Do not use to infer navigation behavior or system behavior not explicitly documented in this source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the Map Monitor message panel and record the AGV fault-related items exactly as shown in the source-backed interface view.

safety_notes: This runbook is diagnostic and limited to visual review of interface items shown in the source.
Do not invent fault meanings, recovery actions, or navigation behavior not stated in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Map Monitor interface
Visual access to the message panel
Training slide or screenshot with AGV fault-related labels

access_required: Access to the Map Monitor interface
system_preconditions: The Map Monitor message panel is visible on the right side of the interface.
external_references: Training slide or screenshot with AGV fault-related labels

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the Map Monitor message panel and the AGV fault-related items referenced by this procedure.

steps.title: View the Map Monitor message panel
steps.purpose: Establish the correct interface area for reviewing AGV fault-related items.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface.
steps.expected_result: The right-side message panel is visible for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The message panel on the right side of the interface is visible and can be inspected.
steps.failure_condition: The message panel is not visible or the expected right-side panel cannot be identified.

actions.label: View message panel
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The right-side Map Monitor message panel and its listed AGV fault-related items.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide shows 'Map Monitor Message Panel' on the right side with robot counts, AGV fault items, disconnected AGV count, fault inspection, locate faulted AGV, and E-stop.

steps.title: Identify the AGV faults drop-down
steps.purpose: Confirm the presence of the AGV fault display control documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the drop-down described as showing AGV faults.
steps.expected_result: The AGV faults drop-down is located in the message panel.
steps.healthy_condition: A drop-down to show AGV faults is visible as documented in the source.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV faults drop-down cannot be found or does not match the source-backed panel items.

actions.label: Find AGV faults drop-down
actions.exact_action: Identify the drop-down described as showing AGV faults.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The item labeled as the drop down to show AGV faults.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR lists AGV fault-related items: dropdown to show AGV faults, count of AGVs disconnected, inspection to view details of fault, and locate faulted AGV.

steps.title: Check the disconnected AGV count
steps.purpose: Verify the presence of the disconnect count item documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Check the displayed 'Count of AGVs disconnected' item.
steps.expected_result: The disconnected AGV count item is visible in the message panel.
steps.healthy_condition: The panel shows the item for count of AGVs disconnected.
steps.failure_condition: The disconnected AGV count item is missing or cannot be matched to the source-backed panel items.

actions.label: Check disconnected AGV count
actions.exact_action: Check the displayed 'Count of AGVs disconnected' item.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The item labeled count of AGVs disconnected.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR lists AGV fault-related items: dropdown to show AGV faults, count of AGVs disconnected, inspection to view details of fault, and locate faulted AGV.

steps.title: Inspect the fault detail area
steps.purpose: Confirm the presence of the fault detail inspection area documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Inspect the panel for the area or control described as inspection to view details of fault.
steps.expected_result: The fault detail inspection area or control is identified in the panel.
steps.healthy_condition: An area or control for inspection to view details of fault is visible as shown in the source.
steps.failure_condition: The fault detail inspection area or control is missing or cannot be identified from the panel.

actions.label: Inspect fault detail area
actions.exact_action: Inspect the panel for the area or control described as inspection to view details of fault.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The area described as inspection to view details of fault.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR lists AGV fault-related items: dropdown to show AGV faults, count of AGVs disconnected, inspection to view details of fault, and locate faulted AGV.

steps.title: Identify the Locate Faulted AGV item
steps.purpose: Confirm the presence of the Locate Faulted AGV item documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the item labeled 'Locate Faulted AGV.'
steps.expected_result: The Locate Faulted AGV item is visible in the panel.
steps.healthy_condition: The panel includes the item labeled Locate Faulted AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The Locate Faulted AGV item is missing or cannot be identified.

actions.exact_action: Identify the item labeled 'Locate Faulted AGV.'

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The item labeled Locate Faulted AGV.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.

steps.title: Record the visible AGV fault-related items
steps.purpose: Capture the source-backed panel items without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the visible AGV fault-related items exactly as shown by the interface without adding undocumented interpretations.
steps.expected_result: A source-aligned record of the visible AGV fault-related items is created.
steps.healthy_condition: The recorded items match the visible interface labels shown in the source.
steps.failure_condition: The record includes inferred meanings, undocumented actions, or items not supported by the source.

actions.label: Record visible items
actions.exact_action: Record the visible AGV fault-related items exactly as shown by the interface without adding undocumented interpretations.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV fault-related labels to be recorded exactly as shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the review requires interpreting fault meanings or recovery actions not stated in the source.
Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR lists AGV fault-related items: dropdown to show AGV faults, count of AGVs disconnected, inspection to view details of fault, and locate faulted AGV.

success_criteria: The Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface is identified.
The AGV faults drop-down is located.
The count of AGVs disconnected item is located.
The fault detail inspection area is located.
The Locate Faulted AGV item is located.
The visible AGV fault-related items are recorded exactly as shown without unsupported interpretation.
healthy_conditions: The right-side message panel is visible.
The panel contains the AGV fault-related items documented by the source.
Recorded observations match the visible labels shown in the source artifact.
failure_conditions: The expected AGV fault-related items are missing from the panel.
The panel cannot be matched to the source-backed training view.
The review requires unsupported interpretation of fault meanings or recovery behavior.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if AGV fault-related items expected from the source are missing from the panel.
Escalate for SME review if interpretation beyond visible labels is required.
Do not invent fault meanings, recovery actions, or navigation behavior not stated in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map Monitor message panel on the right side showing AGV fault-related items.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: OCR lists AGV fault-related items: dropdown to show AGV faults, count of AGVs disconnected, inspection to view details of fault, and locate faulted AGV.

missing_details: The source does not provide fault resolution steps.
The source does not define the exact interaction behavior of the AGV faults drop-down.
The source does not define the exact behavior of the fault detail inspection area.
The source does not define the exact behavior of the Locate Faulted AGV item.
The source does not provide timing estimates, production stop requirements, or LOTO requirements.
